prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科/物理类最低位次分别约1501→2705→1779→1654→2331名，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约550名；2025年物理类基准约2331名；本省理科/物理类计划2021年24人、2022年27人、2023年16人、2024年16人、2025年13人；2026年物理类计划15人，较2025年扩招2人（+15.4%），扩招对竞争有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第19名，近年排名稳定在19名左右，属全国顶尖师范类高校；2026年声誉评价为中性/混合，无重大负面事件；抖音热度为较热（总排名第37），短视频平台关注度中上；2022年曾出现江西录取位次大幅下降的投档异常记录，但近年已恢复稳定；教育学A+、心理学A+、中国语言文学A+、地理学A+、中国史A+、数学A、环境科学与工程A等18个A-及以上学科，学科实力雄厚，对相关专业报考有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业社会热度持续偏热；师范/教育类呈分化观望；本省2026年考生总数约15.4万人，较2025年大幅增长，物理类考生估算约11.1万人，较2025年增长约32%，竞争显著加剧；北京师范大学位于北京，对内蒙古考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在内蒙古招生占比约1.3%-2.5%（2025年约1.34%），属正常水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年扩招2人（+15.4%）对竞争的部分缓解、以及本省物理类考生大幅增长（+32%）带来的竞争加剧，在2025年基准2331名基础上，预计位次小幅上移；预测最低位次约2596名，区间2284–2908名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 理科试验班（励耘实验班）
- 数学与应用数学（卓师计划实验班）
- 计算机科学与技术。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间2284–2908名内，建议以二档专业为主力、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如2284名以内）可重点冲击理科试验班（励耘实验班）和数学与应用数学等王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（2908名附近）应以三档专业为主，兼顾二档中位次较友好的教育学类和法学。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Science/Physics Category were approximately 1501→2705→1779→1654→2331, showing a fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 550 places in the last 3 years; the baseline for Physics Category in 2025 is about 2331; the provincial Science/Physics Category enrollment plan was 24 in 2021, 27 in 2022, 16 in 2023, 16 in 2024, and 13 in 2025; the Physics Category enrollment plan for 2026 is 15, an increase of 2 (+15.4%) compared to 2025, which alleviates competition to some extent.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 19th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, with stable rankings around 19th in recent years, belonging to the top normal universities nationwide; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is neutral/mixed, with no major negative events; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 37th), with above-average attention on short video platforms; in 2022, there was an abnormal admission record with a significant drop in admission rankings in Jiangxi, but it has recovered and stabilized in recent years; Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Geography A+, Chinese History A+, Mathematics A, Environmental Science and Engineering A, and 18 other A- and above disciplines, with strong disciplinary strength, exerting strong appeal for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be socially popular; Normal/Education majors show differentiation and wait-and-see; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 154,000, a significant increase from 2025, with Physics Category examinees estimated at about 111,000, an increase of about 32% from 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, which has strong cross-provincial appeal for Inner Mongolia examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.3%-2.5% (about 1.34% in 2025), which is at a normal level.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the partial alleviation of competition due to the expansion of 2 places (+15.4%) in 2026, and the intensified competition caused by the significant increase in Physics Category examinees in the province (+32%), based on the 2025 baseline of 2331, the ranking is expected to shift slightly upward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2596, with a range of 2284–2908.

- Mathematics and Applied Mathematics (Zhuoshi Plan Experimental Class)
- Computer Science and Technology.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Artificial Intelligence
- Biological Sciences
- Environmental Science and Engineering
- Geographical Science (Zhuoshi Plan Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:

- Carbon Neutrality Science and Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If the ranking is within the predicted range of 2284–2908, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety; if the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 2284), focus on sprinting for flagship majors such as Science Experimental Class (Liyun Experimental Class) and Mathematics and Applied Mathematics; if the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 2908), mainly choose Tier 3 majors, while also considering Tier 2 majors with more friendly rankings such as Education and Law.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 360 → 278 → 403 → 947 → 120, with significant fluctuations; in 2024, the liberal arts ranking was 947, and in 2025, after changing to history category, the ranking moved sharply forward to 120 (impact of the first year of new college entrance examination major group settings); the 2025 baseline is approximately 120; provincial liberal arts/history category plans: 16 in 2021, 15 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 11 in 2024, 6 in 2025; the 2026 history category plan is 6, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked approximately 19th in the 2026 Soft Science main list, a top national university, the highest institution in the normal category; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative events; Douyin popularity is relatively hot (overall ranking 37), with above-average attention on short video platforms; in 2022, there was an abnormal record of a significant drop in admission rankings in Jiangxi, but it has stabilized in recent years; Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Philosophy A-, Law A-, etc., with extremely strong foundational disciplines in liberal arts, exerting strong appeal to liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law category social popularity is relatively hot, teacher training/education category is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese language/literature category is relatively hot; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 154,000, with history category candidates estimated at about 43,000, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025, significantly intensifying competition; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, with strong cross-provincial appeal to liberal arts candidates in Inner Mongolia; the university's enrollment proportion in Inner Mongolia is about 1.3%-2.5%, which is normal.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the abnormally low ranking of 120 in the 2025 history category (first-year effect of the new college entrance examination), the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and the intensified competition due to a significant increase (+32%) in history category candidates in the province, the ranking is expected to rebound; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 170, with a range of 1–370.
